{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's cloudship
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan's cloudship]] is made of dark polished wood outlined in gold with a white-gold cloud and a prow carved into a snarling lion of white and gold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] has a hopping golden cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
